title: The Digital Yen Matures: Bank of Japan Restructures CBDC Blueprint Amid Scaling Hurdles, Bank Protections, and Global Ideological Divides
tags: The second CBDC liaison meeting between the BOJ and related ministriesThe second CBDC liaison meeting between the Bank of Japan and related ministries was held on December 2, 2024. The discussion focused on Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) data handling, privacy, and utilization.Japan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
